resources:
ZanshinTracker
Zanshin Focus Setup Zanshin stands for \"unwavering focus\". Choose a project, set a clear target, and track your progress until it\'s done. Hello bro
1. What do you want to track? 2. How do you want to set your goal? Option A: Target Amount Option B: Time Commitment in hours OR 3. When is your deadline?
Amount (e.g., 40) Unit (e.g. Pages) Time commitment (Hours) Tap to select a date
Need help calculating daily hours? Save & Start Tracking
Helper for the Calculation of the target goal depending on the Deadline How many hours per day do you want to work? Hours per day OK Cancel
Please fill in all fields Saved %s goal! Please choose a deadline! Please set a target amount OR a time commitment! Goal automatically updated to hours! Numbers only! Error in calculation! ‚
Studying for exams
Writing thesis
Everyday tasks
Custom project
